'''Vortia Kwis''' was the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Pure Sabacc (Marauder-class)|''Pure Sabacc'']]. Kwis agreed to ferry refugees from [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] to [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] shortly after the [[Battle of Dubrillion]]. After fighting their way out of a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] sneak attack at Dantooine, Kwis lost faith in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and joined the [[Peace Brigade]], adapting ''Pure Sabacc'' into a traveling recruitment center.<ref name="NJO" />
